tasks.label: Build Overlay
tasks.command: $msbuild = Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio' -Recurse -Filter MSBuild.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if (-not $msbuild) { throw 'MSBuild.exe not found under Visual Studio install' }; & $msbuild 'c:\Users\miste\Downloads\AG Cs2\build\cs2_overlay.slnx' /p:Configuration=Release /t:cs2_overlay /m /v:minimal
